meaning: n.班长,监听器,监视器,监控器vt.监控v.监控
examples: Your doctor will monitor your blood pressure.
Officials had not been allowed to monitor the voting.
He was watching a game of tennis on a television monitor.
They came to monitor a ceasefire agreement which both the rebels and the government were violating.
The more you travel, the more important it is to monitor your physical activity.
